javadoc_before:
/** * Copies a collection of {@code Boolean} instances into a new array of * primitive {@code boolean} values. * *

Note: consider representing the collection as a {@link * BitSet} instead. * * @param collection a collection of {@code Boolean} objects * @return an array containing the same values as {@code collection}, in the * same order, converted to primitives * @throws NullPointerException if {@code collection} or any of its elements * is null */
javadoc_after:
/** * Copies a collection of {@code Boolean} instances into a new array of * primitive {@code boolean} values. * *

Elements are copied from the argument collection as if by {@code * collection.toArray()}. Calling this method is as thread-safe as calling * that method. * *

Note: consider representing the collection as a {@link * BitSet} instead. * * @param collection a collection of {@code Boolean} objects * @return an array containing the same values as {@code collection}, in the * same order, converted to primitives * @throws NullPointerException if {@code collection} or any of its elements * is null */
